message:
fix(sync): rwlock + semaphore OwnedFuture pin projection and zero-permit guard

rwlock.rs:
  OwnedWriteFuture::poll now uses self.get_mut() to obtain &mut Self
  directly, eliminating the need to Arc::clone the lock upfront to
  avoid borrow conflicts through Pin<&mut Self>. The Arc::clone is
  deferred to the Poll::Ready return paths where it's actually needed.
  Same pattern as the OwnedLockFuture fix in mutex.rs.

semaphore.rs:
  OwnedAcquireFuture::poll uses self.get_mut() for direct field
  access, removing the deferred waiter_id assignment pattern that
  worked around Pin borrow conflicts. waiter_id is now set immediately
  when allocated, and the drop(state) + deferred assignment block is
  eliminated. Also adds early return in add_permits(0) to skip
  unnecessary lock acquisition and waker processing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
